allow: Bash(powershell -Command "\(Get-Content src/app/[locale]/strateji-gorusmesi/page.tsx\) -replace 'spacing=\\"lg\\"', 'spacing=\\"hero\\"' | Set-Content src/app/[locale]/strateji-gorusmesi/page.tsx; \(Get-Content src/app/[locale]/teklif-al/page.tsx\) -replace 'spacing=\\"lg\\"', 'spacing=\\"hero\\"' | Set-Content src/app/[locale]/teklif-al/page.tsx; \(Get-Content src/app/[locale]/dijital-checkup/page.tsx\) -replace 'spacing=\\"lg\\"', 'spacing=\\"hero\\"' | Set-Content src/app/[locale]/dijital-checkup/page.tsx; echo done")
Bash(node -e "const t = require\('./messages/tr.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({Services: t.Services, ServicesHub: t.ServicesHub}, null, 2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const t = require\('./messages/en.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({Services: t.Services, ServicesHub: t.ServicesHub}, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const t=fs.readFileSync\('./messages/tr.json','utf8'\); const start=t.indexOf\('\\"Services\\"'\); const end=t.indexOf\('}',t.indexOf\('\\"web\\"',start\)+200\)+2; console.log\(t.slice\(start,end\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const t=fs.readFileSync\('./src/app/[locale]/hizmetler/page.tsx','utf8'\); const s=t.indexOf\('heroTitle'\); console.log\(t.slice\(s-150, s+200\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const {SERVICE_SLUGS} = require\('./src/lib/services'\); const [f, ...r] = SERVICE_SLUGS; console.log\('featured:', f\); console.log\('rest:', r\);")
Bash(node -e "const t = require\('./messages/tr.json'\); const keys = ['metaAds','social','content','web','brandStrategy']; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(t.Services, null, 2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const t = require\('./messages/tr.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(t.ServiceDetail || t.ServicePage || t.ServiceDetail || null, null, 2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const t = require\('./messages/tr.json'\); const keys = Object.keys\(t\); console.log\(keys.join\('\\n'\)\)")
